name: Glazed Sweet Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the sweet potatoes in half crosswise. Place them in a large pot with lightly salted water to cover.
2. Bring the water to a boil and boil until tender, about 30 minutes.
3. Drain the sweet potatoes.
4. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
5. When the sweet potatoes are cool enough to handle, cut them crosswise into 1/4 slices.
6. Spray a 1 1/2 quart baking dish with non-stick cooking spray.
7. Place half of the potato slices in the baking dish, top with margarine, half of the brown sugar and Sweet'n Low Brown sugar, and half of the chopped pecans.
8. Repeat with remaining ingredients.
9. Bake for 20 - 25 minutes or until the pecans begin to brown.
10. Makes 8 servings.
11. Calories: 250 per serving.
12. Calories saved: 105 per serving.
